description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily composed of large glass windows and wooden or composite paneling, giving it a contemporary appearance. The structure sits on a rectangular plot with a green lawn extending from the front to the back, and a paved walkway leading to the entrance. The building has two distinct volumes, with the upper story set back from the lower, creating a stepped profile. The windows are arranged in both horizontal and vertical groupings, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall look is sleek and minimalist, with a focus on geometric forms and open spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, wood paneling, and a stepped two-story design on a rectangular green plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the walkway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated facade, extensive window arrangements, and the stepped upper story.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with additional windows and the continuation of the green lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary facade, window groupings, and the setback of the upper story.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
